items.title: The Atlanta Hawks and Jalen Wilson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Wilson averaged 7.4 points per game in three seasons with the Brooklyn Nets.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Atlanta Hawks and Jalen Wilson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Wilson averaged 7.4 points per game in three seasons with the Brooklyn Nets.

items.title: The Brooklyn Nets declined to tender qualifying offers to Ochai Agbaji and Jalen Wilson, making both unrestricted free agents, league sources told HoopsHype. Agbaji averaged 6.7 points in 20 games after being traded to Brooklyn. Wilson averaged 7.4 points over three seasons as a
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Brooklyn Nets declined to tender qualifying offers to Ochai Agbaji and Jalen Wilson, making both unrestricted free agents, league sources told HoopsHype. Agbaji averaged 6.7 points in 20 games after being traded to Brooklyn. Wilson averaged 7.4 points over three seasons as a Net.
